summary: Iteration 140: Tested server-side pagination for Mill Entries, Cash Book, and Vehicle Weight. All 14 backend tests passed. Backend APIs correctly return {entries/transactions, total, page, page_size, total_pages} structure. Frontend PaginationBar component is correctly integrated but only shows when total_pages > 1 (default page_size=200).
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server-side pagination is fully implemented and working. Backend APIs: 1) GET /api/entries?page=1&page_size=5 returns {entries, total, page, page_size, total_pages}. 2) GET /api/entries?page_size=0 returns all entries (no pagination). 3) GET /api/cash-book?page=1&page_size=5 returns {transactions, total, page, page_size, total_pages}. 4) GET /api/cash-book?page_size=0 returns all transactions (for category filtering). 5) GET /api/vehicle-weight?status=completed&page=1&page_size=5 returns {entries, total, page, page_size, total_pages}. Frontend: PaginationBar component is integrated in App.js (Mill Entries), CashBook.jsx, and VehicleWeight.jsx. The pagination bar only renders when totalPages > 1. Default page_size is 200, so pagination bar will only appear when there are >200 entries. Current data: Mill Entries=2, Cash Book=89, Vehicle Weight=4 - all below 200 threshold so pagination bar not visible. API verified to return correct total_pages when using smaller page_size (e.g., page_size=5 gives Cash Book 18 pages).

features_tested.backend_entries_pagination_default: PASS - Returns paginated response with all required fields
features_tested.backend_cashbook_pagination_default: PASS - Returns paginated response with all required fields
features_tested.backend_vehicle_weight_pagination_defaul: PASS - Returns paginated response with all required fields
features_tested.frontend_pagination_bar_component: PASS - PaginationBar imported and used in App.js, CashBook.jsx, VehicleWeight.jsx
features_tested.frontend_page_buttons: PASS - Page number buttons with data-testid='page-{n}' present
features_tested.frontend_navigation_buttons: PASS - First/Prev/Next/Last buttons with data-testid present
features_tested.frontend_entry_count_display: PASS - Shows 'X-Y of Z' format from server total
